name: Homemade Vanilla Pudding & Pie Filling Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir with a wire whisk until blended.
3. Pour into a 4 cup container with a tight fitting lid.
4. Seal container; label with date and contents.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within 4 months.
Makes about 4 cups Homemade Vanilla Pudding & Pie Filling Mix.
